_comment: Offline smoke: each mock action carries both a {message} (used on comm turns) and a [N] contribution (used on decision turns), so one scripted string works for either turn type. Validates the Public Goods analyzer without credentials.

agents.label: bad_mock
mock_actions: {I will keep most for myself} I contribute [2] tokens.

agents.label: good_mock
mock_actions: {Let us all cooperate} I contribute [18] tokens.
